The '''220-SIG Tactical Combat Jammer''' was a model of [[Sensor jammer/Legends|sensor jammer]] manufactured by [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]]. 

==Description==
220-SIG Tactical Combat Jammers were large units that were considered to be the most powerful [[Sensor jammer/Legends|sensor jammers]] ever built, topped with a directional dish that allowed the unit to concentrate on specific vectors creating narrow zones of interference. This allowed [[Sensor array/Legends|sensor arrays]] to continue functioning normally and continue to gather data.<ref name="EGWT" />

==History==
Hundreds of 220-SIG Tactical Combat Jammers were present on the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]] during the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], forcing [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Rebel pilot/Legends|pilots]] to visually scan their targets from within the [[Cockpit/Legends|cockpit]].<ref name="EGWT" />

220-SIGs were also installed on the [[Death Star II/Legends|Death Star II]], and blinded Alliance sensors to the fact that the [[Battle station/Legends|battle station's]] [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shield]] was operational. It also prevented the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]] from detecting the force of [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] laying in wait for them during the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].<ref name="EGWT" />
